description_long: This is a pair of white low-top sneakers with visible signs of wear and dirt, especially on the soles and around the toe area. The shoes are decorated with hand-drawn doodles and text in various colors, including black, red, and blue, featuring words like 'DREAM' and 'AMOUR', as well as eye illustrations and hearts. The laces are white and appear to be made of cotton, threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern. The shoes have a rounded toe, flat sole, and a padded collar for comfort. The overall construction suggests a canvas or synthetic upper with a rubber sole. There are no visible brand logos, but the unique hand-drawn designs give the shoes a personalized, urban aesthetic.
description: A pair of white, low-top sneakers with hand-drawn doodles and text, showing visible wear and dirt, and featuring standard white laces.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the doodles, 'DREAM' text, eye illustrations, and the worn, dirty toe area.
description_view_1: Angled front view highlighting the laces, toe box, and subtle colored markings on the side.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the 'DREAM' and 'AMOUR' text, as well as the heart and eye doodles along the shoe's outer side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel area, more hand-drawn designs, and the word 'AMOUR' wrapping around the back.
